title: Create: Worldshaper Utilities
description: An enhanced Create Worldshaper with survival-friendly controls.
body:
![create](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e309607ce1ee1b82558b3f88f9e6f6594562b24.png)

**🛠️ Worldshaper Utilities**

🔥 Works in Survival!

Upgrade your building workflow with a powerful new Worldshaper designed for both creative and survival gameplay.

This Create addon adds an enhanced Worldshaper that feels identical to the original — but with smarter mechanics, better control, and survival-friendly building.

![in game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23b9ea37f06820299a9fe5c8412d3ad6a101f3bc.png)

![worldshaper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a5a3b0cf5bfa4179c9204343a8c7d508532276c.png)

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bff088bff78ca8e9f5f440e5204d74c063fd57ad.png)

![GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ce5f8eea6acbde1e9406c23d11b267e4f9ed4a0.png)

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c51e5cbcd3dc395cdde5f4d4d66ffeae65178a4.png)

**✨ Features**

🧱 Adds a new Worldshaper (Create-style)

✅ Fully compatible — does NOT modify Create’s original Creative Worldshaper

🎮 Same UI, controls, modes, preview, and selection behavior

📦 Survival building support

Places blocks directly from your inventory

No blocks = no placement

No duplication

🧊 Creative mode still works without limitations

📏 Configurable range and cuboid size

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c51e5cbcd3dc395cdde5f4d4d66ffeae65178a4.png)

**💥 Clear Mode Improvements**

Optionally drops removed blocks as items. Block drop when using the clear mode! ( can be turned off )

Drops spawn near the player (clean & controlled)

🔘 GUI toggle to enable/disable drops

✨ Optional Silk Touch clear mode

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c51e5cbcd3dc395cdde5f4d4d66ffeae65178a4.png)

**⚙️ Performance & Safety**

🛡️ Block blacklist support

⚙️ Drop/action limits to reduce lag

🚫 Prevents duplication and unsafe behavior

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c51e5cbcd3dc395cdde5f4d4d66ffeae65178a4.png)

**🏭 Crafting**

Includes a Mechanical Crafter recipe

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c51e5cbcd3dc395cdde5f4d4d66ffeae65178a4.png)

**⚙️ Configuration**

Fully customizable via:

worldshaperutilities-common.toml

Adjust:

Range & size limits

Drop behavior

Silk Touch mode

Performance limits

Blacklisted blocks

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c51e5cbcd3dc395cdde5f4d4d66ffeae65178a4.png)

**💡 Why use this?**

The default Creative Worldshaper is powerful — but limited to creative-style usage.

Worldshaper Utilities brings that same power to survival gameplay
without breaking balance or causing item duplication.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c51e5cbcd3dc395cdde5f4d4d66ffeae65178a4.png)

**⚠️ Disclaimer**

This is an addon for the Create mod.
Create is required to run this mod.

This mod does NOT modify or replace Create’s original Worldshaper.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c51e5cbcd3dc395cdde5f4d4d66ffeae65178a4.png)

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

❗ NOT AN OFFICIAL MINECRAFT PRODUCT
NOT APPROVED BY OR ASSOCIATED WITH MOJANG OR MICROSOFT
